item.title: GPT-5.4 来了：能操控电脑、写代码、做表格
item.guid: GPT-5.4-来了：能操控电脑、写代码、做表格
item.description:
Yesterday, OpenAI officially released its latest frontier model GPT-5.4, simultaneously introducing the GPT-5.4 Pro version for complex tasks. 昨天，OpenAI 正式发布最新前沿模型 GPT-5.4，同步推出面向复杂任务的 GPT-5.4 Pro 版本。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Altman crashed the party to release GPT-5.4! Netizens: One "Hi" burned $80 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，奥特曼砸场发布 GPT-5.4！网友：一句 Hi 烧掉 80 美元

The new model integrates the latest advancements in reasoning, programming, and agent workflows, incorporating GPT-5.3-Codex's industry-leading programming capabilities, making it OpenAI's first general model with native computer control capabilities. 新模型整合了推理、编程与智能体工作流三方面的最新进展，并将 GPT-5.3-Codex 的行业领先编程能力纳入其中，成为 OpenAI 首款具备原生计算机控制能力的通用模型。

GPT-5.4 possesses native computer control capabilities in Codex and API: GPT-5.4 在 Codex 和 API 中具备了 原生的计算机控制能力 ：

    Without additional plugins, the model can directly interact with web pages and software interfaces through screenshots combined with keyboard and mouse commands;

    In the OSWorld-Verified benchmark test, which measures desktop environment operational capabilities, GPT-5.4 achieved a score of 75.0%, not only significantly surpassing its predecessor GPT-5.2's 47.3% but also exceeding the human baseline of 72.4%;

    On the WebArena-Verified browser operation benchmark, GPT-5.4 achieved a success rate of 67.3%, and it led the Online-Mind2Web test with an even higher success rate of 92.8%.

In terms of professional knowledge work: 在专业知识工作方面：

    GPT-5.4 achieved a win or draw rate of 83.0% in the GDPval benchmark test covering 44 professions, while GPT-5.2 only reached 70.9%;

    For investment banking-grade spreadsheet modeling tasks, GPT-5.4's score significantly increased from GPT-5.2's 68.4% to 87.3%;

    In presentation evaluations, 68.0% of human evaluators preferred GPT-5.4's output, citing reasons such as richer visuals and higher aesthetic appeal.

Other aspects: 其他方面：

    In terms of controllability, GPT-5.4 Thinking first outputs a "pre-plan" when handling complex queries, allowing users to intervene and adjust the direction at any point during the model's generation process, without needing to start from scratch. This feature is currently available on the ChatGPT web version and Android, with the iOS version to follow;

    Regarding programming capabilities, GPT-5.4's performance on SWE-Bench Pro is on par with or slightly surpasses GPT-5.3-Codex, with lower latency. The new /fast mode in Codex can increase token generation speed by 1.5 times.

It's worth noting that the new "tool lookup" mechanism abandons brute-force loading, drastically reducing overall token consumption by 47% while maintaining accuracy, saving money and speeding things up. 值得一提的是，全新的「工具查找」机制告别了暴力加载，在保持准确率的同时，将总体 Token 消耗暴降了 47%，省钱又提速。

OpenAI states that GPT-5.4 is its most accurate model to date , with a 33% reduction in single factual error rate compared to GPT-5.2, and an 18% reduction in the error rate of complete responses. OpenAI 表示， GPT-5.4 是其迄今为止准确性最高的模型 ，单一事实错误率较 GPT-5.2 降低 33%，完整回复的错误率降低 18%。

In ChatGPT, GPT-5.4 is launched as "GPT-5.4 Thinking," available to Plus, Team, and Pro users, simultaneously replacing GPT-5.2 Thinking. 在 ChatGPT 中，GPT-5.4 以「GPT-5.4 Thinking」形态上线，面向 Plus、Team 和 Pro 用户开放，同步替代 GPT-5.2 Thinking。

Regarding pricing, the standard input price for GPT-5.4 in the API is $2.50 per million tokens, and the output price is $15 per million tokens; the input price for GPT-5.4 Pro is $30 per million tokens, and the output price is $180 per million tokens, both higher than the previous generation GPT-5.2. 定价方面，API 中 GPT-5.4 的标准输入价格为每百万 token 2.50 美元，输出价格为每百万 token 15 美元；GPT-5.4 Pro 的输入价格为每百万 token 30 美元，输出价格为每百万 token 180 美元，均高于前代 GPT-5.2。

item.title: 阿里 CEO 确认林俊旸离职：开源策略不变、持续加大 AI 投入
item.guid: 阿里-CEO-确认林俊旸离职：开源策略不变、持续加大-AI-投入
item.description:
Yesterday, Alibaba CEO Wu Yongming sent an internal email to all employees of the Tongyi Lab, officially confirming the departure of Lin Junyang, the technical lead for Tongyi Qianwen. 昨天，阿里巴巴 CEO 吴泳铭向通义实验室全体员工发出内部邮件，正式确认通义千问技术负责人林俊旸离职。

🔗 Related reading: 48 Hours After Lin Junyang's Departure: A WeChat Moment, a Small Model, and a Trillion-Dollar Hypothesis 🔗 相关阅读： 林俊旸离开的 48 小时：一条朋友圈、一个小模型、和一个万亿美金的假设

In the letter, Wu Yongming announced that the company would establish a foundational model support team, coordinated by Wu Yongming himself, Zhou Jingren, head of Tongyi Lab, and Fan Yu, to jointly coordinate group resources and support the construction of foundational models. 信中，吴泳铭宣布公司将成立基础模型支持小组，由吴泳铭本人、通义实验室负责人周靖人及范禹三人共同协调集团资源，支持基础模型建设。

APPSO learned from informed sources that Alibaba is pushing forward a new round of organizational strategic adjustments internally, planning to comprehensively upgrade its foundational models, massively introduce top technical talent, and shift its strategic focus from relying on a single technical leader to more systematic team building. APPSO 从知情人士处了解到，阿里内部正推进新一轮组织战略调整，计划对基础模型进行整体升级，大规模引入顶尖技术人才，战略重心已从依赖单一技术领袖转向更系统化的团队建设。

This adjustment significantly reduced Lin Junyang's previous scope of business authority, creating a fundamental divergence from his personal career expectations. 这一调整使林俊旸此前总揽的业务职权范围大幅收缩，与其个人职业预期产生根本分歧。

Senior management attempted to retain him yesterday but was unsuccessful. Regarding the claim of "leaving due to unmet KPI assessments," insiders stated it was inconsistent with the facts; the official also denied external concerns that Qwen might switch to closed-source. 高层昨日曾出面挽留，但未能成功。对于「因 KPI 考核不达标而离职」的说法，内部人士称与事实不符；外界担忧千问可能转向闭源的说法，官方同样予以否认。

Alibaba emphasized that Qwen will adhere to the open-source path, and the foundational model team has never been set commercial KPIs such as DAU. The goal of the Qwen large model is to continuously pursue the upper limit of model intelligence, ultimately achieving AGI. 阿里强调，千问将坚持开源路线，基础模型团队从未被设置 DAU 等商业化 KPI，Qwen 大模型的目标是持续追求模型智能上限，最终实现 AGI。

In this personnel change, Yu Bowen, Qwen's post-training lead, has also officially resigned. His work will be taken over by Zhou Hao, a former Senior Staff Research Scientist at Google DeepMind who joined Tongyi Lab earlier this year. Zhou Hao will report to Zhou Jingren. 在此次人事变动中，Qwen 后训练负责人郁博文也已正式离职，其工作将由今年初加入通义实验室的前 Google DeepMind 高级资深研究员周浩接任，周浩向周靖人汇报。

Additionally, Hui Bin, the former head of Qwen Code, left in January this year to join Meta. Meanwhile, there are reports that Hao Zhou, a researcher who worked on the Google Gemini team for over four years and led multi-step reinforcement learning for Gemini 3.0, has joined Qwen. 此外，Qwen Code 负责人惠彬原已于今年 1 月离职，加入 Meta。与此同时，有消息称一位曾在 Google Gemini 团队工作逾四年、主导过 Gemini 3.0 多步强化学习的研究员 Hao Zhou 已加盟千问。

In the email's conclusion, Wu Yongming emphasized adherence to open source and continued increased investment in AI: 吴泳铭在邮件结尾强调将坚持开源，并持续加大 AI 投入：

In technology development, not advancing means falling behind. Developing foundational large models is our key strategy for the future. While continuing to adhere to an open-source model strategy, we will continuously increase R&D investment in the field of artificial intelligence and intensify efforts to attract outstanding talent. Let's work together.

Yesterday afternoon, Omar Sanseviero, a relevant lead from the Google DeepMind development team, extended an olive branch to Qwen team members on X: 昨天下午，谷歌 DeepMind 开发团队相关负责人 Omar Sanseviero 在 X 上向 Qwen 团队相关人员抛出橄榄枝：

If you're looking for a new place to build excellent models and contribute to the open model ecosystem, please contact us! We have a lot of exciting content on our development roadmap, and much work to do in the future.

Regarding claims such as "the core Qwen model team collectively resigned," Alibaba explicitly denied them: "Currently, the Qwen model team is operating stably, there is no 'collective resignation,' and all products and services are running normally." 而对于「千问模型核心团队集体离职」等说法，阿里方面明确否认：目前千问模型团队运行稳定，不存在「集体离职」情况，所有产品与服务均正常运行。

Alibaba also stated that it sincerely welcomes top global AI talent to join and jointly build world-class large model technology and an open-source ecosystem, and will continue to increase investment to provide strong support for the Qwen team. 阿里巴巴同时表示，诚挚欢迎全球顶尖 AI 人才加入，共同构建世界级大模型技术与开源生态，并将持续加大投入，为千问团队提供坚实支撑。

item.title: 雷军再谈内存涨价：手机业务压力很大，将想办法降低消费者负担
item.guid: 雷军再谈内存涨价：手机业务压力很大，将想办法降低消费者负担
item.description:
According to Jiemian News, Lei Jun stated yesterday that the surge in AI demand has led to a continuous rise in storage chip prices. 据界面新闻报道，雷军昨天表示，AI 需求暴涨引发存储芯片价格持续攀升。

Our mobile phone business faces significant pressure, and we will explore various methods to minimize the difficulty for consumers to accept.

This is the third time Lei Jun has spoken publicly about chip price increases recently. 这已是雷军近期在公开场合第三次就芯片涨价问题发声。

    Last October, Lei Jun made his first public statement in response to the price increase of the Redmi K90 series, frankly stating that "memory prices have risen too much recently" and pointing out that product price adjustments stemmed from rising upstream storage chip costs, which phone manufacturers found difficult to fully absorb.

    In January this year, Lei Jun again mentioned in a live broadcast that storage chip prices are rising quarterly, with a 40%~50% increase in the fourth quarter of last year, and he expects continued increases in the first quarter of this year, with the annual cost for automotive memory alone potentially increasing by several thousand yuan.

It is worth noting that just yesterday, Beike Finance reported, citing a vivo store employee, that all vivo mobile phone products will officially increase in price starting March 15th. Previously released older models are all within the scope of price adjustment, with an overall brand increase of approximately 10%~15%. 值得注意的是，就在昨天，贝壳财经援引 vivo 门店店员报道称，vivo 旗下全系手机产品将于 3 月 15 日起正式上调售价，此前已发布的旧机型均在调价范围内，品牌整体涨幅约 10%~15%。

The store employee explained that various brands are currently setting a buffer period mainly to deplete existing low-cost storage chip inventory. Once this inventory is exhausted and high-cost chip products are launched, manufacturers will have to implement a new pricing system to ensure profit margins. 店员解释，各品牌目前设置缓冲期，主要是为了消化现有的低价存储芯片库存，待这批库存耗尽、高成本芯片产品上市后，厂商为保证利润空间将不得不执行新的售价体系。

item.title: 曝 OPPO Find X9 系列将打通苹果 AirDrop，无需安装 App
item.guid: 曝-OPPO-Find-X9-系列将打通苹果-AirDrop，无需安装-App
item.description:
According to Android Authority, OPPO stated in a press release during MWC 2026 that its Find X9 series phones will achieve interoperability with Apple's AirDrop through Google's "Quick Share" feature, becoming the first Android phone manufacturer after Google Pixel to support this function. 据 Android Authority 报道，OPPO 在 MWC 2026 期间的一篇新闻稿中表示，旗下 Find X9 系列手机将通过 Google 的「快速分享」功能实现与苹果 AirDrop 的互通，成为继 Google Pixel 之后首家支持该功能的 Android 手机厂商。

Users can conveniently and securely transfer files between OPPO phones and iOS, iPadOS, and macOS devices without installing any third-party applications, thereby enhancing cross-platform interoperability.

OPPO also revealed that the feature was jointly developed with Google and MediaTek. This update will cover the Find X9 and Find X9 Pro, and the upcoming Find X9 Ultra will also support this feature. OPPO 还透露，该功能由其与 Google 及联发科联合开发。此次更新将覆盖 Find X9 和 Find X9 Pro，即将推出的 Find X9 Ultra 也将支持这一特性。

Previously, OPPO launched the "OPPO Interconnect" App to enable local network file sharing with iOS, but iPhone users had to manually download the app from the App Store to complete the transfer. 此前，OPPO 曾推出「OPPO 互联」App 来实现与 iOS 之间的局域网文件共享，但 iPhone 用户必须手动在 App Store 下载该应用才能完成传输。

item.title: 8GB 内存遭「龙虾之父」吐槽，想买 MacBook Neo 跑龙虾的可以死心了
item.guid: 8GB-内存遭「龙虾之父」吐槽，想买-MacBook-Neo-跑龙虾的可以死心了
item.description:
Yesterday, "Father of Lobster" Peter Steinberger just posted on X, sharply commenting on the MacBook Neo's memory configuration: "The new MacBook Neo has 8GB unified memory? Rough." (The new MacBook Neo only has 8GB unified memory? That's tough.) 昨天，「龙虾之父」Peter Steinberger 刚刚在 X 上发文，对 MacBook Neo 的内存配置给出了锐评：「The new MacBook Neo has 8GB unified memory? Rough.（新款 MacBook Neo 只有 8GB 统一内存？太难绷了。）」

Friends who want to buy this machine to run "Lobster" OpenClaw 🦞 can basically give up on that idea... 想买这台机器用来跑「龙虾」OpenClaw 🦞 的朋友们基本可以断了这个念想了…

In fact, the MacBook Neo is not designed for professional creators, but rather a lightweight, entry-level MacBook. 事实上，MacBook Neo 并非为专业创作者而生，而是一台轻量化的入门级 MacBook。

It is worth mentioning that in a certain self-operated Apple store, Mac series products have already been labeled as "Apple AI computers" and "Apple AI laptops," embracing the AI wave even before Apple's official website. 值得一提的是，在某自营 Apple 店铺中，目前 Mac 系列产品已经打上了「苹果 AI 电脑」、「苹果 AI 笔记本」的标签。比 Apple 官网还要更先一步迎合 AI 浪潮。

🔗 Related Reading: Why did "Lobster" first appear on computers, not phones? | AI Artifacts 🔗 相关阅读： 为什么「龙虾」首先出现在电脑，而不是手机？｜AI 器物志

item.title: 「没有人比我们更懂电池」，比亚迪第二代刀片电池 10% 充至 97% 仅需 9 分钟
item.guid: 「没有人比我们更懂电池」，比亚迪第二代刀片电池-10%-充至-97%-仅需-9-分钟
item.description:
Last night, BYD held the second-generation Blade Battery and Flash Charging Technology press conference. Wang Chuanfu, Chairman and President of BYD Group, announced that with the support of flash charging technology, the second-generation Blade Battery can charge from 10% to 97% in just 9 minutes, with the charging time from 10% to 70% being only 5 minutes. 昨晚，比亚迪举行了第二代刀片电池暨闪充技术发布会。比亚迪集团董事长兼总裁王传福宣布，第二代刀片电池在闪充技术支持下可实现电量从 10% 充至 97% 仅需 9 分钟，其中 10% 至 70% 的充电时间仅为 5 分钟。

At the press conference, Wang Chuanfu stated: "No one understands batteries better than us (BYD)." 发布会上，王传福表示：「没有人比我们（比亚迪）更懂电池。」

BYD simultaneously announced the first batch of 10 models equipped with the second-generation Blade Battery and flash charging technology, including Denza Z9 GT, Song Ultra, 2026 Sea Lion 06 EV, Seal 07 EV, Fang Cheng Bao Titanium 3, Yangwang U7 2026, and Datang, among others. 比亚迪同步公布了首批 10 款搭载第二代刀片电池与闪充技术的车型，包括腾势 Z9 GT、宋 Ultra、2026 款海狮 06 EV、海豹 07 EV、方程豹钛 3、仰望 U7 2026 款、大唐等。

Regarding the charging infrastructure layout, BYD officially released the "Flash Charge China" strategy, planning to build 20,000 flash charging stations by the end of this year, including 18,000 "flash charging stations within stations" and 2,000 "flash charging highway stations." 在充电基础设施布局上，比亚迪正式发布「闪充中国」战略，计划于今年年底前建成 2 万个闪充站，其中包括 1.8 万座「闪充站中站」和 2000 座「闪充高速站」。

Wang Chuanfu stated that the 18,000 "flash charging stations within stations" will be built relying on the existing public charging station network, without the need for grid expansion or new land, and can be completed within a week. Once built, they will achieve coverage of BYD flash charging stations within 5 kilometers in 90% of urban areas. 王传福表示，1.8 万座「闪充站中站」将依托现有公共充电站网络建设，无需扩容电网或新增用地，一周内即可建成，建成后将实现城区内 90% 区域 5 公里内覆盖比亚迪闪充站。

For highways, BYD plans to first complete the construction of 1,000 flash charging highway stations before this year's "May Day" holiday, ultimately achieving an average of one flash charging station every 100 kilometers on highways, covering nearly one-third of highway service areas. 高速方面，比亚迪计划于今年「五一」前率先建成首批 1000 座闪充高速站，最终实现高速路平均每隔 100 多公里就有一座闪充站，覆盖接近三分之一的高速服务区。

Wang Chuanfu also announced that flash-charging vehicles equipped with the second-generation Blade Battery will enjoy one year of free flash charging service, and flash charging stations will also be open for public sharing. 王传福同时宣布，搭载第二代刀片电池的闪充车辆可享受一年免费闪充服务，闪充站亦将对社会开放共享。

🔗 Related Reading: Fully charged in just 9 minutes! BYD unveils its second-generation Blade Battery, with 10 new models simultaneously equipped 🔗 相关阅读： 充饱只要 9 分钟！比亚迪端出第二代刀片电池，首批 10 款新车同步搭载

item.title: 曝 OpenAI 启动上市准备，估值 7300 亿美元或创科技 IPO 纪录
item.guid: 曝-OpenAI-启动上市准备，估值-7300-亿美元或创科技-IPO-纪录
item.description:
According to "The Information," OpenAI has selected two law firms, Cooley and Wachtell Lipton Rosen & Katz, to prepare for its initial public offering (IPO), with a potential listing as early as the fourth quarter of this year. 据《The Information》报道，OpenAI 已选定 Cooley 和 Wachtell Lipton Rosen & Katz 两家律师事务所，为其首次公开募股（IPO）做准备，最快可能于今年第四季度正式上市。

Both law firms have previously been deeply involved in OpenAI's legal affairs: 这两家律所此前均已深度介入 OpenAI 的法律事务：

    Wachtell is a New York-based law firm that has assisted OpenAI with several acquisitions, including last year's $6.5 billion acquisition of Jony Ive's hardware company io products, and the $1.1 billion acquisition of product analytics startup Statsig;

    Cooley is known for advising technology companies on their IPOs, having worked on IPO projects for companies such as Nvidia and Snowflake. The Financial Times previously reported on OpenAI's contact with Cooley but did not disclose the final selection.

Currently, OpenAI is undergoing a new round of financing, with a pre-money valuation of $730 billion. With an additional $110 billion investment in this round, the valuation will further increase. If successfully listed, this IPO will rank among the largest tech stock IPOs in history. 目前，OpenAI 正进行新一轮融资，融资前估值已达 7300 亿美元，加上本轮 1100 亿美元投资后估值将进一步抬升。若顺利上市，此次 IPO 将跻身史上规模最大的科技股上市案例之列。

Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang stated yesterday at the Morgan Stanley investor conference in San Francisco that the previous plan to invest up to $100 billion in OpenAI "will probably not proceed" because "they are going public." 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋昨天在旧金山摩根士丹利投资者大会上表示，此前计划向 OpenAI 投资最多 1000 亿美元的方案「大概不会推进了」，原因是「他们要上市了」。

item.title: MacBook 全线在英国及欧盟不再随附充电器
item.guid: MacBook-全线在英国及欧盟不再随附充电器
item.description:
According to MacRumors, Apple's new MacBook lineup released this week will no longer include chargers in the UK and EU countries (including Germany, France, Italy, Spain, etc.). Local users will need to purchase a power adapter separately if required. 据 MacRumors 报道，苹果本周发布的新款 MacBook 全线在英国及欧盟国家（包括德国、法国、意大利、西班牙等地）均不再随附充电器，当地用户如需电源适配器须单独购买。

Affected models include the newly released MacBook Neo, MacBook Air, and the entire MacBook Pro series this week. 受影响的机型涵盖本周新发布的 MacBook Neo、MacBook Air 以及 MacBook Pro 全系。

Fortunately, other regional markets such as Asia and North America are not affected by this adjustment for now, and the 2026 MacBook models will still come with chargers as usual. Apple's official Chinese website shows that all models of the Chinese domestic version retain the power adapter: 好在亚洲、北美等其他地区市场暂不受此次调整影响，2026 款 MacBook 仍照常随附充电器。苹果中国官网显示，国行版本各机型均保留了电源适配器：

    MacBook Neo comes with a 20W USB-C adapter;

    14-inch M5 Pro (16-core GPU) comes with a 70W adapter;

    14-inch M5 Pro (20-core GPU) and M5 Max models come with a 96W adapter;

    The 16-inch MacBook Pro comes with a 140W adapter.

Apple characterizes this move as consistent with its long-standing environmental philosophy, as products like iPhone and Apple Watch have previously stopped including charging bricks. 苹果方面将此举定性为符合其一贯环保理念的举措，iPhone、Apple Watch 等产品此前均已相继取消随附充电头。

However, some users in the MacRumors comment section pointed out that the direct cause of this change is more likely to be driven by EU regulations. 不过，MacRumors 评论区有网友指出，此次变化的直接诱因更可能是欧盟法规的推动。

The EU's Universal Charger Directive (EU 2022/2380) requires manufacturers to offer consumers a purchase option without a charger, and most manufacturers' actual response is to simply stop including it, making consumers buy it themselves. 欧盟《通用充电器指令》（EU 2022/2380）要求制造商须为消费者提供不含充电器的购买选项，而大多数厂商的实际应对方式，便是直接取消随附，让消费者自行掏钱购买。

item.title: 「安卓电脑」真要来了，Android 16 推出外接显示器扩展功能
item.guid: 「安卓电脑」真要来了，Android-16-推出外接显示器扩展功能
item.description:
Recently, Google announced the official release of the "Connected Display" feature in Android 16 QPR3, deeply integrating mobile and desktop computing. 近日，Google 宣布 Android 16 QPR3 版本正式开放「已连接的显示屏」（Connected Display）功能，将移动端与桌面计算深度融合。

This feature previously debuted at Google I/O 2025 and supports devices including the Pixel 8, 9, 10 series, as well as several Samsung models like the S26, Fold7, Flip7, and Galaxy Tab S11. 该功能此前已在 Google I/O 2025 上亮相，支持设备包括 Pixel 8、9、10 系列以及三星 S26、Fold7、Flip7 和 Galaxy Tab S11 等多款机型。

After users connect their phone or tablet to an external display via a data cable, the display will directly present a desktop-like environment, complete with a bottom taskbar, support for pinning frequently used apps, and the ability to run multiple freely resizable windows simultaneously. 用户通过数据线将手机或平板连接至外部显示器后，显示器上将直接呈现一个类桌面环境，配有底部任务栏，支持固定常用应用，并可同时运行多个自由调整大小的窗口。

Meanwhile, the phone itself can maintain an independent working state, with both operating without interference. 与此同时，手机本身仍可保持独立的工作状态，两者互不干扰。

For tablets that support desktop window management (such as the Samsung Galaxy Tab S11), after connecting to an external display, the desktop can be directly extended to two screens, and application windows can be freely dragged between them. 对于支持桌面窗口化管理的平板（如三星 Galaxy Tab S11），连接外接显示器后，桌面可直接扩展至两块屏幕，应用窗口可在两边自由拖动。

item.title: Google Play 抽成降至 20%，开放第三方支付
item.guid: Google-Play-抽成降至-20%，开放第三方支付
item.description:
According to TechCrunch and The Tech Buzz, Google announced yesterday that it has reached a settlement with Epic Games, the developer of Fortnite, officially ending their multi-year antitrust lawsuit. 据 TechCrunch 及 The Tech Buzz 报道，Google 昨日宣布与《堡垒之夜》开发商 Epic Games 达成和解，双方长达数年的反垄断诉讼正式画上句号。

As part of the settlement agreement, Google will significantly adjust the commission structure of the Google Play Store and open up third-party payment and alternative app store channels. 作为和解协议的一部分，Google 将对 Google Play 商店的抽成结构进行大幅调整，并开放第三方支付及替代应用商店渠道。

According to publicly disclosed terms, Google will reduce the basic service fee for Google Play from the original 30% to 20%, and the commission for subscription apps will drop to 10%. If developers choose to continue using Google's own billing system, an additional 5% fee will be charged on top of this. 根据公开披露的条款，Google 将把 Google Play 的基础服务费从原先的 30% 下调至 20%，订阅类应用的抽成则降至 10%。若开发者选择继续使用 Google 自有结算系统，需在此基础上额外支付 5% 的费用。

Developers participating in the "Games Level Up Program" or "Apps Experience Program" will be eligible for a preferential rate of 15% for transactions generated by new installed users. The aforementioned global commitment will continue until September 30, 2032. 参与「Games Level Up Program」（游戏升级计划）或「Apps Experience Program」（应用体验计划）的开发者，新安装用户产生的交易将适用 15% 的优惠费率。上述全球性承诺将持续至 2032 年 9 月 30 日。

The rate adjustments will be implemented in phases globally: before June 30 this year, the new rates will first take effect in the United States, the United Kingdom, and the EU region; Australia will be covered before September 30 this year; South Korea and Japan will be included before December 31 this year; and the remaining global regions will complete the switch before September 30 next year. 费率调整将分阶段在全球落地：今年 6 月 30 日前，新费率将率先在美国、英国及欧盟地区生效；今年 9 月 30 日前覆盖澳大利亚；今年 12 月 31 日前扩展至韩国和日本；其余全球地区将于明年 9 月 30 日前完成切换。

item.title: 京东去年全年营收破 1.3 万亿，新业务高速增长但亏损超 466 亿
item.guid: 京东去年全年营收破-1.3-万亿，新业务高速增长但亏损超-466-亿
item.description:
JD.com yesterday released its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. 京东昨日发布 2025 年第四季度及全年业绩报告。

    Full-year revenue reached RMB 1,309.1 billion, a 13.0% increase from 2024. Full-year net profit was RMB 19.6 billion, a significant decline from RMB 41.4 billion in the same period last year; net profit under non-GAAP was RMB 27 billion.

    Fourth-quarter revenue was RMB 352.3 billion, a year-on-year increase of 1.5%, but a net loss of RMB 2.7 billion was recorded for the single quarter, compared to a net profit of RMB 9.9 billion in the same period last year.

Performance across business segments showed significant divergence: 各业务板块表现分化明显：

    JD Retail's full-year revenue was RMB 1,126.399 billion, with an operating profit of RMB 51.402 billion, a profit margin of 4.6%, and double-digit year-on-year growth in operating profit.

    JD Logistics' full-year revenue was RMB 217.146 billion, with an operating profit of RMB 5.269 billion, and a profit margin of 2.4%.

    New businesses generated full-year revenue of RMB 49.282 billion, a substantial year-on-year increase of 157.3%, but also incurred significant losses, with an operating loss of RMB 46.641 billion and a profit margin of -94.6%.

By category: 品类层面：

    The electronics category's full-year revenue grew by 7.1% year-on-year, affected by a high base.

    The general merchandise category achieved double-digit growth for 5 consecutive quarters, with full-year revenue increasing by 15.3% year-on-year, accounting for over 40% of product revenue, reaching a new annual high.

    The supermarket category has achieved double-digit growth for 8 consecutive quarters. Service revenue grew by 23.6% year-on-year for the full year, accounting for 21.8% of total revenue, also reaching a new annual high.

Other aspects: 其他方面：

    User scale: Last year, the number of annual active users increased to over 700 million, and both quarterly active users and user shopping frequency grew by over 30% year-on-year.

    Offline expansion continues: As of the end of last year, JD MALL had 26 operating stores nationwide, JD Home Appliances City Flagship Stores exceeded 110, and 3C digital offline stores surpassed 4,500.

    In terms of instant retail business, JD Waimai's order volume remained stable in the fourth quarter, and losses narrowed; the fresh food format 7Fresh Kitchen has reached 30 stores in Beijing.

    Regarding overseas business, the European online retail platform Joybuy is currently in trial operation in 6 countries and is scheduled to officially launch in March this year.

    In terms of human resources, as of the end of last year, the total number of personnel in the JD ecosystem exceeded 900,000, and the total human resources expenditure for the full year reached RMB 157.2 billion.

item.title: VAST 完成 5000 万美元 A 轮融资，阿里领投
item.guid: VAST-完成-5000-万美元-A-轮融资，阿里领投
item.description:
AI 3D generation company VAST announced yesterday the completion of a $50 million Series A financing round. This round was co-led by Alibaba and Hengxu Capital, with follow-on investments from Yuanhe Puhua, BV Baidu Ventures, Oriental Fortune, and others. Existing shareholders Primavera Capital and Beijing Artificial Intelligence Industry Investment Fund made additional investments. AI 3D 生成公司 VAST 昨日宣布完成 5000 万美元 A 轮融资，本轮由阿里、恒旭资本联合领投，元禾璞华、BV 百度风投、东方嘉富等跟投，老股东春华创投与北京市人工智能产业投资基金超额加注。

VAST was founded in 2023, and its 3D generation platform, Tripo Studio, has already gathered over 6.5 million creators. This round of financing will primarily be invested in talent recruitment and algorithm iteration for world models, as well as advancing the construction of its UGC interactive content platform. VAST 成立于 2023 年，旗下 3D 生成平台 Tripo Studio 已聚集超过 650 万创作者，本轮融资将重点投入世界模型的人才招募与算法迭代，以及 UGC 互动内容平台的建设推进。

Along with the financing news, VAST simultaneously released its new family of AI 3D large models: 伴随融资消息，VAST 同步发布全新 AI 3D 大模型家族：

    Tripo H3.1 claims to have achieved industry-leading performance in core metrics such as input alignment, structural accuracy, texture quality, and generation speed, further resolving previous generation difficulties like character faces and geometric text;

    The newly architected Tripo P1.0 model achieves synchronous generation of complex topologies by performing 'probabilistic collapse' on the overall spatial structure, enabling the output of professional modeler-level 3D assets within 2 seconds, improving generation speed by over a hundred times compared to existing solutions.

Last year, VAST shifted its core R&D resources towards world models. Relying on an accumulation of 50 million high-quality 3D data points, its first world model will be released soon. 去年，VAST 已将核心研发资源转向世界模型方向，依托 5000 万条高质量 3D 数据积累，首款世界模型将于近期发布。

item.title: GitHub 频繁宕机，OpenAI 决定自己造替代品
item.guid: GitHub-频繁宕机，OpenAI-决定自己造替代品
item.description:
According to The Information, OpenAI is developing an internal code hosting platform to replace Microsoft's GitHub. 据 The Information 报道，OpenAI 正在开发一款内部代码托管平台，以替代微软旗下的 GitHub。

Sources revealed that the direct reason for this decision is the frequent service outages GitHub has experienced in recent months, preventing OpenAI engineers from submitting code normally or collaborating with colleagues, with outage durations ranging from minutes to hours. 消息人士透露，促成这一决定的直接原因是 GitHub 近几个月来频繁发生服务中断，导致 OpenAI 工程师无法正常提交代码或与同事协作，中断时长从数分钟到数小时不等。

This project is currently in its early development stages, and it may take several more months to complete and test. Employees involved in the project have internally discussed the possibility of offering it as a product for sale to existing OpenAI customers. However, OpenAI might ultimately choose to keep it for internal use only and not release it externally. 这一项目目前仍处于早期开发阶段，距离完成和测试可能还需数月时间。参与该项目的员工已在内部讨论将其作为产品向 OpenAI 现有客户开放销售的可能性。不过，OpenAI 也可能最终选择仅供内部使用，不对外发布。

In February this year, GitHub experienced a four-hour outage, which officials attributed to underlying Azure issues; a week later, another approximately three-hour interruption occurred, and officials admitted in the incident report that 'GitHub's availability has not met expected levels.' 今年 2 月，GitHub 曾发生一次长达四小时的宕机，官方将原因归结为 Azure 底层问题；一周后再度发生约三小时的中断，官方在事故报告中承认「GitHub 的可用性尚未达到预期水平」。

The report also noted that self-developed code repositories are not uncommon among large tech companies. Google and Meta have both developed their own code hosting systems for internal use—Piper and Sapling, respectively—but neither has been commercialized externally. 报道还指出，自研代码仓库在大型科技公司中并不罕见。Google 和 Meta 均已为内部使用开发了各自的代码托管系统——分别是 Piper 和 Sapling，但两者均未对外商业化。

item.title: 💡 马斯克：特斯拉将是首个以人形机器人形式实现 AGI 的公司
item.guid: 💡-马斯克：特斯拉将是首个以人形机器人形式实现-AGI-的公司
item.description:
Recently, Elon Musk posted on X that Tesla will be the first company to achieve AGI in the form of 'humanoid robots.' 近日，马斯克在 X 发文表示，特斯拉将是首个以「人形机器人」形式实现 AGI 的公司。

Previously, his AI company xAI was widely regarded as the primary vehicle for his AGI ambitions. However, after xAI was acquired by SpaceX and pivoted to focus on space computing infrastructure development, Tesla officially took over the mantle of 'embodied AGI' positioning. 此前，他旗下的 AI 公司 xAI 一直被外界视为其 AGI 野心的主要载体。而在 xAI 被 SpaceX 收购、转型专注于太空算力基础设施建设之后，特斯拉正式接过了「具身 AGI」的这一 G 定位。

According to not a tesla app, in Musk's vision, Tesla's path to AGI is fundamentally different from the large language model approach taken by OpenAI and others. 据 not a tesla app 报道，在马斯克的构想中，特斯拉通向 AGI 的路径与 OpenAI 等大语言模型路线截然不同。

Over the years, Tesla has accumulated massive amounts of real-world road video data through its FSD project and developed its own AI chips, training a system capable of understanding physical laws and making decisions in complex real-world environments. 特斯拉多年来通过 FSD 项目积累了海量真实道路视频数据，并自研 AI 芯片，训练的是一个能够理解物理规律、在复杂现实环境中做出决策的系统。

Musk views this 'atomic shaping' capability as the key to true AGI, rather than mere language or reasoning abilities. 马斯克将这种「原子塑造」能力视为通往真正 AGI 的关键，而非单纯的语言或推理能力。

According to Tesla's latest plan, the Optimus Gen 3 production intent prototype will be released in the first quarter of this year, with small-batch deployment beginning internally at Tesla factories in the mid-term, entering mass production by year-end. The long-term goal is an annual production of 1 million units, with the price pushed down to approximately $20,000. 根据特斯拉最新计划，今年第一季度将发布 Optimus Gen 3 量产意向原型，中期开始在特斯拉工厂内部小批量部署，年底进入大规模量产阶段，长期目标是年产 100 万台，售价压至约 2 万美元。

To achieve this, Tesla has ceased production of Model S and Model X, freeing up production lines at its Fremont factory for Optimus Gen 3 manufacturing. 为此，特斯拉已停产 Model S 和 Model X，将弗里蒙特工厂产线腾出用于 Optimus Gen 3 的生产。

Regarding the timeline, Musk maintained his previous prediction—that AGI will be achieved this year and surpass the sum total of all human intelligence before 2030. 在时间节点上，马斯克维持了此前的预测——AGI 将于今年实现，并在 2030 年前超越全人类智能的总和。

However, this judgment significantly diverges from the mainstream AI research community: a survey last year covering over 8,500 AI researchers showed that the probability of AGI being achieved before 2040 is only about 50%; AI scholar Andrew Ng, meanwhile, explicitly stated that the arrival of AGI will still take decades. 不过，这一判断与主流 AI 研究界存在显著分歧：去年一项覆盖逾 8500 名 AI 研究人员的调查显示，AGI 在 2040 年前实现的概率仅约 50%；AI 学者吴恩达则明确表示，AGI 的到来还需数十年。

item.title: 349 英镑起，Nothing Phone (4a) 系列正式发布
item.guid: 349-英镑起，Nothing-Phone-(4a)-系列正式发布
item.description:
Yesterday, Nothing held a press conference in London, officially launching two mid-range models, Phone (4a) and Phone (4a) Pro, and the Headphone (a) earbuds. 昨天，Nothing 在伦敦举办发布会，正式推出 Phone (4a) 和 Phone (4a) Pro 两款中端机型和 Headphone (a) 耳机。

It is worth noting that, according to Wired, Nothing has confirmed that it will not launch a flagship Phone (4) model this year. 值得注意的是，据 Wired 报道，Nothing 已确认今年不会推出旗舰 Phone (4) 机型。

Nothing Phone (4a) : **Nothing Phone (4a)**：

    Equipped with Qualcomm Snapdragon 7s Gen 4, paired with UFS 3.1 storage;

    Rear 50MP main camera (Samsung sensor) + 50MP 3.5x periscope telephoto + 8MP ultra-wide angle, front 32MP;

    6.78-inch AMOLED screen, 30~120Hz variable refresh rate, 4500 nits peak brightness, covered with Corning Gorilla Glass 7i;

    Built-in 5080mAh battery (Indian version 5400mAh), supports 50W wired fast charging;

    The back features Nothing's iconic Glyph Bar (63 mini LEDs, 7 zones) and a video recording indicator light;

    IP64 dust and water resistance; available in white, black, blue, and pink;

    Starting price is £349 / €349 (8GB + 128GB), the 12GB + 256GB version sells for £399 / €429.

Nothing Phone (4a) Pro : Nothing Phone (4a) Pro ：

    Qualcomm Snapdragon 7 Gen 4, performance improved by about 30% compared to the standard version;

    Rear 50MP Sony LYT700C main camera + 50MP 3.5x periscope telephoto (supports up to 140x hybrid zoom) + 8MP ultra-wide angle, front 32MP; supports 4K Ultra XDR and Dolby Vision recording;

    6.83-inch AMOLED, 30~144Hz, 5000 nits peak brightness, Corning Gorilla Glass 7i;

    5080mAh battery (Indian version 5400mAh), supports 50W wired fast charging;

    Circular Glyph Matrix dot-matrix screen in the upper right corner (137 mini LEDs, supports functions like Glyph Toys, Glyph Mirror), video recording indicator light, Essential Space;

    First-time adoption of an all-metal unibody design, body thickness 7.95mm; available in black, silver, and pink, IP65 dust and water resistance;

    Starting price is $499 / £499 / €479 (8GB + 128GB), the 12GB + 256GB version sells for $599 / £549 / €549.

Regarding release dates, Phone (4a) is already available for pre-order and officially goes on sale on March 13th; Phone (4a) Pro opens for pre-order on March 13th and officially goes on sale on March 27th, with exclusive sales in the US region via Amazon. 发售时间上，Phone (4a) 已开启预购，3 月 13 日正式开售；Phone (4a) Pro 于 3 月 13 日开启预购，3 月 27 日正式开售，美国地区将独家通过亚马逊渠道销售。

item.title: 26.98 万元起，腾势 Z9GT 正式上市，纯电续航 1036 公里
item.guid: 26.98-万元起，腾势-Z9GT-正式上市，纯电续航-1036-公里
item.description:
Last night, BYD officially unveiled the all-new Denza Z9GT at the second-generation Blade Battery and Flash Charging Technology press conference. The new car offers 5 configuration models, with a price range of 269,800 to 369,800 yuan. 昨晚，比亚迪在第二代刀片电池暨闪充技术发布会上正式发布全新腾势 Z9GT，新车共推出 5 款配置车型，售价区间为 26.98 万至 36.98 万元。

In terms of appearance, the new model moves the lidar to the roof, adds a smart driving blue light, and features new 21-inch wheels. The interior has been completely refreshed, using red-stitched carbon fiber material and integrated sports seats. 外观方面，新款车型将激光雷达上移至车顶位置，新增智驾小蓝灯，并搭配全新 21 寸轮圈。内饰全面焕新，采用红线编织碳纤维材质与运动一体式座椅。

    First to feature BYD's second-generation Blade Battery, offering two power versions: pure electric and DiLink 3.0 plug-in hybrid;

    The pure electric flagship version has a CLTC pure electric range of 1036 km; the pure electric performance version has a range of 820 km and accelerates from 0 to 100 km/h in 2.7 seconds; the plug-in hybrid version has a pure electric range of 401 km, and a comprehensive range of 1301 km with a full tank and full charge;

    All models are equipped with BYD's latest flash charging technology, charging from 10% to 70% in just 5 minutes, and from 10% to 97% in just 9 minutes;

    Built on the DiLink 3.0 intelligent vehicle control technology platform, equipped with Yunlian-A intelligent air body control system, electric rear wing, and flexible rear-wheel steering, standard with carbon-ceramic brake discs and six-piston calipers;

    Length, width, and height are 5195 (5180) / 1990 / 1480 (1500) mm respectively, with a wheelbase of 3125 mm;

    All models come standard with the Eye of God 5.0 assisted driving system, equipped with lidar and 34 sensors, supporting complex scenarios such as city mapless navigation and dead-end parking.

item.title: 499 元起，影石 Insta360 正式推出 Snap 手机自拍屏
item.guid: 499-元起，影石-Insta360-正式推出-Snap-手机自拍屏
item.description:
Yesterday, Insta360 released the Snap phone selfie screen, featuring "stick and use," aiming to solve the pain point of not being able to preview in real-time when taking selfies with the phone's rear camera, allowing users to take selfies with main camera quality. 昨天，影石 Insta360 发布 Snap 手机自拍屏，主打「一贴即用」，旨在解决手机后置镜头自拍时无法实时取景的痛点，让用户以主摄画质完成自拍。

Snap features a 3.5-inch ultra-clear display, connecting directly to a phone via USB-C, requiring no separate charging, and is plug-and-play. Snap 搭载 3.5 英寸超清显示屏，通过 USB-C 有线直连手机，无需单独充电，即插即用。

The basic version has a body thickness of only 7.3mm, magnetically attaches to the back of the phone, and is widely compatible with Apple and Android models. The wired direct connection method is more stable than wireless image transmission, and synchronous preview can also be achieved when shooting 4K video. 基础版机身厚度仅 7.3mm，磁吸贴附于手机背面，广泛兼容苹果及安卓机型。有线直连的方式相较无线图传更为稳定，拍摄 4K 视频时同样可实现同步预览。

Users can adjust exposure, switch filters or shooting modes via the touchscreen, and support one-key mirror flip to restore the visual habit of looking in a mirror. Snap is compatible not only with native phone cameras but also with mainstream photo editing and professional photography software, making it convenient for users to combine with third-party apps to expand creative possibilities. 用户可通过触屏调节曝光、切换滤镜或拍摄模式，并支持一键镜像翻转，还原照镜子的视觉习惯。Snap 不仅兼容手机原生相机，也支持主流美图及专业摄影软件，方便用户结合第三方 App 扩展创意玩法。

Snap offers two versions: a basic version and a fill light version, with official prices starting from 499 yuan. Snap 提供基础版与补光版两种规格，官方售价 499 元起。

Insta360 also partnered with beauty optics brand AMIRO Miglight to launch a fill light version equipped with a ring fill light, supporting three color temperatures and five brightness levels, adapting to different shooting scenarios such as backlighting and indoor low light. 影石还联合美妆光学品牌 AMIRO 觅光，推出配备环形补光灯的补光版本，支持三种色温与五档亮度调节，适应逆光、室内弱光等不同拍摄场景。

item.title: 李杰：一加 15T 首发 7500mAh「超巨量」电池
item.guid: 李杰：一加-15T-首发-7500mAh「超巨量」电池
item.description:
Yesterday, Li Jie, President of OnePlus China, revealed on Weibo that the OnePlus 15T will be the first to feature a massive 7500mAh Glacier Battery. 昨天，一加中国区总裁李杰在微博透露，一加 15T 将首发 7500mAh 超巨量冰川电池。

...not only significantly leading all small-screen flagships but even surpassing most large-screen flagship models.

In terms of charging, the OnePlus 15T simultaneously upgrades to 100W wired flash charging + 50W wireless flash charging, and supports full-scenario bypass power supply. 充电方面，一加 15T 同步升级为 100W 有线闪充 + 50W 无线闪充，并支持全场景旁路供电。

In previous warm-ups, Li Jie also successively disclosed other core configurations: 在此前的预热中，李杰还陆续披露了其他核心配置：

    Equipped with the fifth-generation Snapdragon 8 Ultimate Edition processor;

    The screen adopts a new chip-level packaging process, achieving 1.xx mm physically extremely narrow bezels on all four sides;

    Equipped with a LUMO periscope telephoto lens (50MP, 85mm, F2.8, equivalent to 3.5x optical zoom);

    Adopts a small matrix family-style exterior design, supporting full-level waterproofing with IP66, IP68, IP69, and IP69K ratings.

Currently, the OnePlus 15T has completed its Ministry of Industry and Information Technology network access certification and will be officially released this month. 目前，一加 15T 已完成工信部入网认证，将于本月正式发布。

item.title: 阶跃星辰 Step 3.5 Flash 调用量登顶小龙虾全球第一
item.guid: 阶跃星辰-Step-3.5-Flash-调用量登顶小龙虾全球第一
item.description:
Yesterday, StepFun AI fully open-sourced its new generation base model, Step 3.5 Flash. Its popularity quickly soared, and its call volume on OpenClaw rapidly jumped to number one globally. 昨天，阶跃星辰全面开源新一代基座模型 Step 3.5 Flash，热度迅速攀升，调用量在 OpenClaw 上迅速跃居全球第一。

The top five models that followed were MiniMax M2.5, Trinity Large Preview (free), Kimi K2.5, and Claude Sonnet 4.6. 紧随其后的前五名分别为 MiniMax M2.5、Trinity Large Preview（free）、Kimi K2.5 以及 Claude Sonnet 4.6。

According to reports, Step 3.5 Flash adopts a mixed expert architecture with a total of 196 billion parameters, but only about 11 billion are called during actual operation. It has surpassed many larger open-source models in various benchmark tests such as inference, code, and Agent. 据介绍，Step 3.5 Flash 采用混合专家架构，总参数量 1960 亿，但实际运行时只调用其中约 110 亿，在推理、代码、Agent 等多项基准测试上均超过了不少体量更大的同类开源模型。

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash 💻 GitHub: https://github.com/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash

🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash/tree/main 🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash/tree/main

👾 ModelScope: https://modelscope.cn/models/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash 👾 ModelScope: https://modelscope.cn/models/stepfun-ai/Step-3.5-Flash

item.title: Yuan 3.0 Ultra 正式开源：万亿参数，专为企业 Agent 场景打造
item.guid: Yuan-3.0-Ultra-正式开源：万亿参数，专为企业-Agent-场景打造
item.description:
Yesterday, the YuanLab.ai team officially open-sourced and released the Yuan 3.0 Ultra multimodal foundational large model. This is the flagship model of the Yuan 3.0 series, designed for trillion-parameter scale, and is one of only three trillion-level open-source multimodal large models currently in the industry. 昨天，YuanLab.ai 团队正式开源发布源 Yuan 3.0 Ultra 多模态基础大模型。这是源 3.0 系列面向万亿参数规模打造的旗舰模型，也是目前业界仅有的三个万亿级开源多模态大模型之一。

    Adopts a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture, with a total of 1T parameters and 68.8B active parameters;

    Introduces a Fast-thinking reinforcement learning paradigm, improving training accuracy by 16.33% and reducing output token count by 14.38%;

    Surpasses cutting-edge models such as GPT-5.2, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Claude Opus 4.6 in multiple tasks;

    The unified multimodal architecture supports collaborative modeling of visual and language information, excelling in enterprise scenarios for tasks such as multimodal document understanding, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), tabular data analysis, content summarization, and tool invocation.

It is reported that the Yuan 3.0 series will subsequently launch Flash (40B) and Pro (200B) versions. 据悉，源 Yuan 3.0 系列后续还将推出 Flash（40B）和 Pro（200B）版本。

💻 GitHub: https://github.com/Yuan-lab-LLM/Yuan3.0-Ultra 💻 GitHub: https://github.com/Yuan-lab-LLM/Yuan3.0-Ultra

🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/YuanLabAI/Yuan3.0-Ultra-int4 🤗 Hugging Face: https://huggingface.co/YuanLabAI/Yuan3.0-Ultra-int4

👾 ModelScope: https://modelscope.cn/models/YuanLabAI/Yuan3.0-Ultra-int4 👾 ModelScope: https://modelscope.cn/models/YuanLabAI/Yuan3.0-Ultra-int4

item.title: 抖音「随心团」更名为「抖音即送」
item.guid: 抖音「随心团」更名为「抖音即送」
item.description:
According to 36Kr, Douyin Life Service's "Suixintuan" business has been officially renamed "Douyin Jishong" (Douyin Instant Delivery). 据 36 氪报道，抖音生活服务旗下「随心团」业务已正式更名为「抖音即送」。

"Suixintuan" is a targeted invitation-only business launched by Douyin Life Service for high-quality dine-in merchants. It collaborates with merchants that support takeout delivery, offering users a dual choice for the same group-buy package: "in-store voucher verification" and "delivery to home." 「随心团」是抖音生活服务面向优质堂食商家推出的定向邀请制业务，与支持外卖配送的商家合作，为用户提供同一团购套餐「到店验券」与「配送到家」的双重选择。

As of early December last year, over 3,000 brands had participated in "Suixintuan." In the fourth quarter of last year, the average daily payment GMV for chain merchants participating in "Suixintuan" increased by 211% compared to the first quarter of the same year. 截至去年 12 月初，「随心团」参与品牌已超 3000 家，去年四季度连锁商家「随心团」支付 GMV 较同年一季度日均提升 211%。

A relevant person in charge at Douyin Life Service stated that during more than a year of official operation, the platform has observed a growing user demand for high-quality food delivery. This upgrade and renaming aims to further meet consumer expectations and help merchants achieve more profit growth based on their existing offline operating costs. 抖音生活服务相关负责人表示，平台在一年多的正式运营中观察到用户对高品质外卖的需求日益增长，此次升级更名旨在进一步满足消费者期待，同时帮助商家在固有线下经营成本基础上实现更多盈利增长。

item.title: 阿里首家线下潮玩店「好运连得」落地北京
item.guid: 阿里首家线下潮玩店「好运连得」落地北京
item.description:
According to Tech Planet, Alibaba's first offline trendy toy store, "Haoyun Liande LUCKY LOOP", has quietly opened in Beijing. It is located in the sunken plaza of The Box Chaowai Youth Power Center in Chaowai Street, Chaoyang District, and is currently in normal operation. 据 Tech 星球报道，阿里旗下首家线下潮玩店「好运连得 LUCKY LOOP」已低调落地北京，选址朝阳区朝外街道 The Box 朝外年轻力中心下沉广场，目前已进入正常运营阶段。

The store is positioned as a comprehensive trendy toy collection store, covering multiple categories such as blind boxes, trendy figurines, and cultural and creative merchandise. It introduces popular IPs like TNT and Wakuku, as well as overseas trendy toy brands, while also prominently displaying Alibaba's three upcoming proprietary trendy toy IPs: Nooobit, Penny, and Hoya. 门店定位为综合性潮玩集合店，涵盖盲盒、潮流手办、文创周边等多品类，引入 TNT、Wakuku 等热门 IP 及海外潮玩品牌，同时重点展示阿里即将推出的三个自有潮玩 IP：Nooobit、Penny 和 Hoya。

The report also pointed out that the "Haoyun Liande" Shanghai store has also entered the preparation phase, located at basement Fg-2, No. 82 Xinle Road, Xuhui District. The orange English logo "LUCKY LOOP" has already been installed on the second-floor wall. 报道还指出，「好运连得」上海门店也已进入筹备阶段，选址位于徐汇区新乐路 82 号 basement Fg-2 层，「LUCKY LOOP」橙色英文 logo 已安装于二楼墙面。

item.title: 高德实时公交扩展至县域市场
item.guid: 高德实时公交扩展至县域市场
item.description:
Yesterday, Amap announced the entry of real-time public transport into county-level markets, aiming to solve the long-standing pain point of "not being able to wait for a bus" in rural travel through digital infrastructure. 昨天，高德地图宣布实时公交进驻县域市场，旨在通过数字基建解决乡村出行中「等不到车」的长期痛点。

The first deeply implemented case is located in Lixian County, Longnan, Gansu. Currently, 11 bus routes and 36 buses in the county have gone live in real-time, basically covering the county seat and surrounding towns, serving a population of about 100,000. 首个深度落地案例位于甘肃陇南礼县，目前该县已有 11 条公交线路、36 辆公交车实现实时上线，基本覆盖县城及沿线乡镇，服务人口约 10 万。

It is reported that the system integrates three core functions: route mapping, navigation planning, and real-time public transport. Villagers can check the real-time location and estimated arrival time of vehicles via their mobile phones, and the system error has been reduced to within 2 minutes. 据悉，该系统集成了线路上图、导航规划与实时公交三大核心功能，村民可通过手机查看车辆实时位置与预计到站时间，系统误差已缩减至 2 分钟以内。

item.title: 《挽救计划》定档 3 月 20 日
item.guid: 《挽救计划》定档-3-月-20-日
item.description:
The sci-fi film "Project Hail Mary" is scheduled to be released simultaneously worldwide in China on March 20. 科幻电影《挽救计划》已定档 3 月 20 日在国内同步全球上映。

The film is adapted from the novel of the same name by Andy Weir, author of "The Martian" (Douban rating 9.1), and stars Ryan Gosling. 影片改编自《火星救援》作者安迪·威尔的同名小说（豆瓣评分 9.1），由瑞恩·高斯林主演。

The story tells of Ryland Grace, an ordinary middle school science teacher, who wakes from a coma to find himself alone on a spaceship with no memory. 故事讲述一名普通的中学科学老师格雷斯从昏迷中醒来，发现自己孤身置身于宇宙飞船之中，记忆全无。

As his memory fragments gradually piece together, he realizes that the sun is being "devoured" by mysterious alien microorganisms, Earth is on the brink of an ice age crisis, and he has been sent to the Tau Ceti star system, a full 12 light-years from Earth, tasked with the mission to save all humanity. 随着记忆碎片逐渐拼合，他才意识到太阳正在被神秘外星微生物「吞噬」，地球已濒临冰河时代危机，而他被送往距地球整整 12 光年的天仓五星系，肩负拯救全人类的使命。

item.title: 《奇迹梦之队》开启预售，3 月 14 日登陆院线
item.guid: 《奇迹梦之队》开启预售，3-月-14-日登陆院线
item.description:
The animated film "Miracle Dream Team" officially began national pre-sales yesterday (March 5), simultaneously releasing its exclusive Chinese trailer and poster. 动画电影《奇迹梦之队》已于昨日（3 月 5 日）正式开启全国预售，并同步发布中国独家预告及海报。

The film is executive produced for the first time by NBA star Stephen Curry. The story revolves around Will, an underdog small goat, who, along with his teammates, stages a comeback from the bottom of the season to ultimately write a legend on the court. 影片由 NBA 球星史蒂芬·库里首度担任制片人，故事围绕一只不被看好的小个子山羊威尔展开——他与队友们从赛季垫底一路逆袭，最终书写赛场传奇。

Since its overseas release, the film's global box office has now exceeded $130 million. The release date is set for March 14, coinciding with Stephen Curry's birthday. 3,000 cinemas nationwide will simultaneously create exclusive birthday celebrations, offering "Curry's Birthday" special screenings. 影片自海外上映以来，目前全球票房已突破 1.3 亿美元。定档日期选在 3 月 14 日，恰逢史蒂芬·库里生日当天，全国 3000 家影城将同步打造专属生日庆典，开设「库里生日」专属场次。

item.title: 要抢野兽先生饭碗？首档 AI 网红真人秀《The Bot House》第一集下周上线
item.guid: 要抢野兽先生饭碗？首档-AI-网红真人秀《The-Bot-House》第一集下周上线
item.description:
Yesterday, OpenArt Studios, the content brand under the AI creative tool platform OpenArt, announced the launch of "The Bot House", touted as the world's first AI influencer reality show, with its first episode officially going live next week. 昨天，AI 创意工具平台 OpenArt 旗下内容厂牌 OpenArt Studios 宣布推出《The Bot House》，号称是全球首档 AI 网红真人秀节目，第一集将于下周正式上线。

The show's premise is highly similar to traditional reality TV shows: 节目设定与传统真人秀高度相似：

Six AI virtual influencers "move in" under the same roof, experiencing challenges, dramatic conflicts, and "identity crises". The only rule for survival is: either go viral, or be deleted.

This setup directly borrows the elimination mechanism from classic reality shows like "Big Brother" and "Love Island", and makes "going viral" itself the core of the narrative. 这一设定直接借鉴了《老大哥》《爱情岛》等经典真人秀的淘汰机制，并将「走红」本身作为叙事核心。

After the "Bot House" trailer was released on YouTube, it quickly surpassed 830,000 views. Reactions in the comment section were polarized: some users expressed, "Finally, this format!", while others criticized it as "unbelievably awkward". 《Bot House》预告片在 YouTube 上线后迅速突破 83 万次播放，评论区反应两极：有用户表示「终于等到这个形式」，也有人批评其为「难以置信的尬」。
